tasks.label: Icarus: smoke waveform
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && iverilog -g2012 -Wall -o build/wave_smoke.vvp tests/tb_wave_smoke.v && vvp build/wave_smoke.vvp && code --reuse-window build/wave_smoke.vcd

tasks.label: Icarus: BRAM waveform
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && iverilog -g2012 -Wall -o build/tb_bram_module.vvp tests/tb_bram_module.v src/hdl/bram_module.v && vvp build/tb_bram_module.vvp && code --reuse-window build/bram_module.vcd

tasks.label: Icarus: CORDIC waveform
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && iverilog -g2012 -Wall -o build/tb_cordic_generator.vvp tests/tb_cordic_generator.v src/hdl/cordic_generator.v && vvp build/tb_cordic_generator.vvp && code --reuse-window build/cordic_generator.vcd
